other_observers: Austin Hess, David Wade, Sue Riffe, Georgia Doyle, Denise Bretting, Paul Opler, Tina Jones; Cheri Orwig; originally reported by Andy Bankert earlier on 15Sep2014
description: adult; seen at close range harassing gulls on shore at swim beach; also seen floating on water opposite the jet ski launch and also in the south end of the lake. About the size of Parasitic Jaeger and similar in plumage but lacking white patch under the wings, and with white marks on the upper wing restricted to two shafts of outermost primaries; black cap more extensive that that of Parasitic Jaeger. Central tail feathers long and pointed, extending about 6 inches beyond length of tail. Otherwise dark brown upperparts, and gray underparts becoming white on breast, neck and head (except for black cap).
photographer: Photographer: N Komar, N Komar, N Komar, N Komar
